samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier using shifting and adding operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">First 8-bit input operand (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Second 8-bit input operand (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the product of A and B.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Multiplier uses shift-and-add method to compute the product of A and B.
        - Iteratively adds A to the product for each set bit in B.
        - Shifts A left after each addition.
        - Final product is stored in the output register.
    </implementation>
</module>
